from __future__ import annotations

import importlib

ALLOWED_PLUGINS = {"plugins.audit", "plugins.metrics"}


def dynamic_plugin_loaded_from_config_without_registry_allowlist_negative(module_name: str) -> object:
    if module_name not in ALLOWED_PLUGINS:
        raise ValueError(f"unsupported plugin: {module_name}")
    module = importlib.import_module(module_name)
    return module.Plugin()
